<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qu</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>底<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">me</rt></ruby>？<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yào</rt></ruby><ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>穿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chuān</rt></ruby><ruby>细<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xì</rt></ruby><ruby>软<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ruǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mɑ</rt></ruby>？<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>穿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chuān</rt></ruby><ruby>细<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xì</rt></ruby><ruby>软<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ruǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>王<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>宫<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>臣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chén</rt></ruby><ruby>仆<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>施<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shī</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>复<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huó</rt></ruby>，<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>些<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiē</rt></ruby><ruby>异<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lɑi</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>希<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>律<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǜ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>想<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shā</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>怕<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pà</rt></ruby><ruby>百<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>姓<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xìnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>孝<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiào</rt></ruby><ruby>敬<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>母<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mǔ</rt></ruby>。’<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>藉<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>遗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chuán</rt></ruby>，<ruby>废<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fèi</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>诫<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mìnɡ</rt></ruby>。

‘<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>百<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>姓<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>嘴<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>唇<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chún</rt></ruby><ruby>尊<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zūn</rt></ruby><ruby>敬<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">què</rt></ruby><ruby>远<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>吩<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>咐<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fu</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>导<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>拜<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>枉<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>然<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rán</rt></ruby>。’”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tīnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>白<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bɑi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>入<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Rù</rt></ruby><ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>污<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>秽<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>污<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>秽<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>赛<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sài</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huà</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fú</rt></ruby>（“<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fú</rt></ruby>”<ruby>原<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>文<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wén</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby>“<ruby>跌<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">diē</rt></ruby><ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dǎo</rt></ruby>”），<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mɑ</rt></ruby>？”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>栽<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zāi</rt></ruby><ruby>种<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>栽<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zāi</rt></ruby><ruby>种<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>拔<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bá</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lɑi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>任<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>凭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>吧<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bɑ</rt></ruby>！<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>瞎<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiā</rt></ruby><ruby>眼<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>领<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>瞎<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiā</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>领<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>瞎<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiā</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>两<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">liǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>掉<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">diào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>坑<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>今<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jīn</rt></ruby><ruby>还<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>白<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mɑ</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>岂<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>入<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rù</rt></ruby><ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>运<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yùn</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>肚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dù</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>落<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">luò</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>茅<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">máo</rt></ruby><ruby>厕<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">si</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mɑ</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>惟<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>独<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dú</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>才<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cái</rt></ruby><ruby>污<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>秽<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">è</rt></ruby><ruby>念<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">niàn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>凶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shā</rt></ruby>、<ruby>奸<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>淫<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yín</rt></ruby>、<ruby>苟<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby>、<ruby>偷<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tōu</rt></ruby><ruby>盗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby>、<ruby>妄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>谤<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">讟<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dú</rt></ruby>，

“<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>好<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>清<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>早<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>雇<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡù</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>葡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>萄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>园<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ren</rt></ruby><ruby>讲<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>定<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>钱<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>银<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yín</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>打<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>葡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>萄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>园<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>巳<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>市<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>还<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>闲<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xián</rt></ruby><ruby>站<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>葡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>萄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>园<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby>。’<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qu</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>午<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>申<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xínɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>酉<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>还<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>站<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">me</rt></ruby><ruby>整<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby><ruby>闲<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xián</rt></ruby><ruby>站<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ne</rt></ruby>？’

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>雇<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡù</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby>。’<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>葡<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pú</rt></ruby><ruby>萄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>园<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qù</rt></ruby>。’

<ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Dào</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>晚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>园<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>管<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ren</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>工<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>钱<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qiɑn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>止<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǐ</rt></ruby>。’

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>酉<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>雇<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>钱<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>银<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yín</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Jí</rt></ruby><ruby>至<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>雇<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dé</rt></ruby>，<ruby>谁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuí</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>钱<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qián</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>埋<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mán</rt></ruby><ruby>怨<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：

<ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>其<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qí</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>朋<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Pénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>友<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">you</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>亏<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kuī</rt></ruby><ruby>负<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>讲<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>定<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>钱<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>银<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yín</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mɑ</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Ná</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>走<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>吧<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bɑ</rt></ruby>！<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>东<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xi</rt></ruby><ruby>难<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nán</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>随<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suí</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>思<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">si</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mɑ</rt></ruby>？<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>好<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>红<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>眼<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mɑ</rt></ruby>？’

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qián</rt></ruby>；<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>（<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>古<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>卷<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">juǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǒu</rt></ruby>“<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>召<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>选<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xuǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>少<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shǎo</rt></ruby>”）。”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>冷<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hou</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">èr</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>带<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">biān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：

“<ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>冷<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>交<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiāo</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>祭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>司<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sī</rt></ruby><ruby>长<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>文<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wén</rt></ruby><ruby>士<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby>。<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>定<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuì</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>交<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiāo</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wài</rt></ruby><ruby>邦<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>戏<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xì</rt></ruby><ruby>弄<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nònɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>鞭<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>打<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dǎ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>钉<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>字<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>架<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jià</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>第<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>三<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sān</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>复<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huó</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>庇<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>太<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tài</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>母<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>亲<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qīn</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>两<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">liǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>拜<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bài</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby>，<ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>件<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">me</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ne</rt></ruby>？”<ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>两<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">liǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>坐<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>右<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">biɑn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>坐<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>左<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zuǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">biɑn</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">me</rt></ruby>。<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>喝<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hē</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>杯<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bēi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>喝<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hē</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mɑ</rt></ruby>？”<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nénɡ</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Ná</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>税<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuì</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>钱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kàn</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>银<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yín</rt></ruby><ruby>钱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>号<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hào</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>谁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuí</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>？”

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shì</rt></ruby><ruby>凯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Kǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>凯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Kǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>凯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Kǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sā</rt></ruby>；<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>希<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xī</rt></ruby><ruby>奇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kāi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>走<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>。<ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">Sā</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>该<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">ɡāi</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>辩<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">lùn</rt></ruby>

<ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Sā</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>该<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāi</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>常<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>复<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huó</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>。<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：

“<ruby>夫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fū</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>摩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Mó</rt></ruby><ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xī</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Rén</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>孩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">di</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>娶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>妻<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>哥<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡē</rt></ruby><ruby>哥<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡe</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>立<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hòu</rt></ruby>。’

<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>七<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby>。<ruby>第<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>娶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>妻<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>孩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>撇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">piě</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>妻<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">di</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>第<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">èr</rt></ruby>、<ruby>第<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>三<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>直<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhí</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>第<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>七<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>复<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huó</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby>，<ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>七<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>妻<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ne</rt></ruby>？<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>娶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>复<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huó</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby>，<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>娶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǔ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>嫁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jià</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhě</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Lùn</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>复<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huó</rt></ruby>，<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>经<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>向<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>念<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">niàn</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mɑ</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bó</rt></ruby><ruby>拉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lā</rt></ruby><ruby>罕<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>。’<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>死<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huó</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>希<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xī</rt></ruby><ruby>奇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qí</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>训<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xun</rt></ruby>。<ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>赛<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">sài</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>辩<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">lùn</rt></ruby>

<ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>赛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sài</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>堵<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>该<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡāi</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kǒu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>聚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jù</rt></ruby><ruby>集<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jí</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>内<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nèi</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>律<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǜ</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>师<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>试<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>探<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：

“<ruby>夫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fū</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>律<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǜ</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>诫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mìnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>条<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiáo</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>最<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ne</rt></ruby>？”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>尽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>尽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>性<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xìnɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>尽<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>诫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>第<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby>，<ruby>且<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>最<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>其<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Qí</rt></ruby><ruby>次<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>相<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>仿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ren</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>两<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">liǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>条<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiáo</rt></ruby><ruby>诫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>律<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǜ</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>总<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>纲<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡānɡ</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>法<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>赛<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sài</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>聚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jù</rt></ruby><ruby>集<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：

“<ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Lùn</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dū</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>何<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby>？<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>谁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuí</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>孙<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sūn</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ne</rt></ruby>？”<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shì</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>孙<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sūn</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>灵<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">línɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>感<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>动<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dònɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>怎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zěn</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby><ruby>还<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>称<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǔ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：

‘<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>坐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>右<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biɑn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>等<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">děnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>仇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chóu</rt></ruby><ruby>敌<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dí</rt></ruby><ruby>放<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>脚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby>。’

<ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>既<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>称<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǔ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>怎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zěn</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby><ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dà</rt></ruby><ruby>卫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>孙<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sūn</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ne</rt></ruby>？”

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>言<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yán</rt></ruby>。<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>敢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>再<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>讲<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lùn</rt></ruby>，
